Dispute Resolution

Introduction

The Communications and Multimedia Act 1998 seeks to provide that disputes between persons or parties about matters under the Act should be resolved by negotiations between the two parties before escalating to formal proceedings.

Guidelines for Dispute Resolution October 2024

Download Guidelines for Dispute Resolution

  • Form 1 – Notification of Dispute
    Word PDF
  • Form 2 – Statement of Case
    Word PDF
  • Form 3 – Statement of Reply
    Word PDF

Dispute Resolution Cases

For a list of resolved dispute cases, refer to the Dispute Cases Register.
